# thoth_fleets (Data Source)

Reads fleets with optional status, region, and provider filters.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `provider` (String) Optional provider filter.
- `region` (String) Optional region filter.
- `status` (String) Optional fleet status filter.

### Read-Only

- `data_json` (String) Fleet rows as JSON array.
- `total` (Number) Total fleets returned after filtering.
